_publications._publicationTitle: Evaluation of quality of life in adults with neurofibromatosis 1 (NF1) using the Impact of NF1 on Quality Of Life (INF1-QOL) questionnaire
_publications._context: The Impact of NF1 on Quality of Life (INF1-QOL) questionnaire was developed by a literature search for common terms, focus group (n = 6), semi-structured interviews (n = 21)

basicInfo.description: 14-item disease-specific questionnaire measuring quality of life in adults with NF1; developed via literature search, focus groups, and semi-structured interviews; total score range 0–42
basicInfo.synonyms: Impact of NF1 on Quality Of Life
basicInfo.psychometricProperties: good internal reliability (Cronbach’s alpha 0.87); correlated with total EuroQol (r = 0.82, p < 0.0001) and Riccardi NF severity score (r = 0.34, p < 0.05)
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: National Neurofibromatosis Service, Guy's and St. Thomas' NHS Foundation Trust; Department of Clinical Neuroscience, King's College London
